text:
EMAymniam is the 4th track on the original soundtrack of the film Attack on Titan Part 1: Guren no Yumiya. It is also the 2nd track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

The title refers to the fact that the track incorporates remixes of E・M・A and YAMANAIAME.

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-3:26) is a remix of YAMANAIAME (0:00-1:38), followed by a remix of the first part of E・M・A (1:48-2:53). The second part (3:27-5:28) incorporates the YAMANAIAME ostinato at 3:40-3:54 and 4:07-4:22, and the YAMANAIAME bridge at 4:23-5:28.
